title: astragalus alpicola
intro: Astragalus alpicola, also known as Alpine Milk Vetch or Mountain Milk Vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus alpicola are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus alpicola can be prepared as a tea, powder, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
